conducteur.subtitle: FIELD CONDUCTOR · INSCRIPTION ENGINE
conducteur.title1: The field sets how the territory manifests.
conducteur.title2: Each adjustment affects passages, encounters and the traces left behind.
conducteur.title3: The same place reveals different lines according to the accord of the moment.
conducteur.needCard: An activated card is required to access the conductor.
conducteur.noChamps: No active field. Creating a field commits the reading.
conducteur.cadence: Estimated cadence: one appearance every 7 to 12 minutes.
